title: approvals.proposed_payload — action_type=whatsapp_group_send (v1)
description: Payload contract for a proposed WhatsApp group send. Validated app-side (Windmill + Lane A UI). Not enforced in Postgres.

group_label.description: Human-readable group label for the approval UI; not used for routing.

message_text.description: Hebrew-aware message body. Plain text in v1; templates/markdown deferred.

media_ref.description: Optional media attachment reference. Resolved by Windmill at execution time, not stored inline.

scheduled_at.description: Optional ISO-8601 UTC timestamp. If null, send on approval. Windmill enforces; not a CHECK.

context.description: Free-form context for the approval UI / audit. Does not control routing.

summary_hebrew.description: 1–2 sentence Hebrew summary shown in the approval card.
